name: Mutant Assassin 3D
description: In the action-packed game &ldquo;Mutant Assassin 3D,&rdquo; you become a skilled special agent. Armed with web-launching abilities, you take on bad guys across diverse terrains. Your mission: eliminate all foes by ensnaring them with your webs and delivering powerful punches. As you progress through 4 levels, prepare for the ultimate challenge: the boss level. No hints here&mdash;navigate the best route to victory on your own. Good luck!
instructions: Hold and swipe the screen aim
tags: 3D, Arcade, Boys, Casual, First Person Shooter, Simulation, Stickman
